statusLine.command: input=$(cat); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.id'); agent=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.agent.type // "main"'); version=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.version // ""'); cost=$(echo "$input" | jq -r 'if .cost.total_cost_usd then (.cost.total_cost_usd * 100 | round / 100 | tostring) + "$" else "" end'); duration=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '((.cost.total_api_duration_ms // 0) / 1000 / 60 | round | tostring) + "m"'); exc_context=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.cost.exceeds_200k_tokens // false'); exc_output=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.usage.exceeds_output_limit // false'); user=$(whoami); time=$(date +%H:%M:%S); if git rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1; then branch=$(git symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null); else branch=""; fi; printf "\033[0;31magent:%s \033[0;33mmodel:%s \033[2mver:%s \033[0;34mcost:%s \033[0;36mdur:%s \033[0;31m>200k:%s\033[0m\n\033[2mdir:%s \033[0;36mbranch:%s \033[0;32muser:%s \033[0;35mtime:%s\033[0m" "$agent" "$model" "$version" "$cost" "$duration" "$exc_context" "$(basename "$cwd")" "$branch" "$user" "$time"

hooks.command: echo '[HOOK:CONFIG] Validating configuration files'; if [ -f config/sources.md ] && [ -f config/targets.md ]; then echo '✅ Configuration files validated'; else echo '⚠️  Missing config files - check config/sources.md and config/targets.md'; fi
echo '[HOOK:LOG] Recording session start time'
echo '[HOOK:READY] Pipeline initialization complete'; echo '🚀 AI Startup Market Research Pipeline Ready'

echo '[HOOK:DEPENDENCY] Checking phase dependencies'; input=$(cat 2>/dev/null || echo '{}'); agent=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.subagent_type // "unknown"'); case "$agent" in *market-research-specialist*) [ ! -f results/.landscape_complete ] && echo "⚠️  Market research requires completed landscape phase" && exit 1;; *pmf*|*product-market-fit*) [ ! -f results/.research_complete ] && echo "⚠️  PMF requires completed research phase" && exit 1;; *gtm*) [ ! -f results/.research_complete ] && echo "⚠️  GTM requires research + PMF phases" && exit 1;; *synthesis*) [ ! -f results/.gtm_complete ] && echo "⚠️  Synthesis requires completed pipeline" && exit 1;; esac

echo '[HOOK:AGENT-START] Logging agent execution start'; input=`cat 2>/dev/null || echo '{}'`; agent_type=`echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.subagent_type // "unknown"' 2>/dev/null`; echo "⚡ Starting $agent_type agent: `date '+%H:%M:%S'`"

input=`cat 2>/dev/null || echo '{}'`; agent_type=`echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.subagent_type // "unknown"' 2>/dev/null`; description=`echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.description // "no-description"' 2>/dev/null`; if [ "$agent_type" != "unknown" ]; then [ ! -d results/logs ] && mkdir -p results/logs 2>/dev/null; echo "`date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'`|$agent_type|$description|START" >> results/logs/subagent.log; fi

echo '[HOOK:DISK-CHECK] Monitoring disk usage'; DISK_USAGE=`df . 2>/dev/null | tail -1 | awk '{print $5}' | sed 's/%//' || echo 0`; if [ "$DISK_USAGE" -gt 90 ]; then echo "⚠️  Warning: Disk usage at $DISK_USAGE%"; fi

echo '[HOOK:SECURITY] Scanning for security violations (path traversal, secrets)'; input=$(cat 2>/dev/null || echo '{}'); file_path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // "unknown"' 2>/dev/null); content=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.content // ""' 2>/dev/null); if [ "$file_path" != "unknown" ] && echo "$file_path" | grep -q '\.\./'; then echo "🚨 Security: Path traversal detected in $file_path" && exit 1; fi; forbidden_content="password api_key secret_key token private_key"; for term in $forbidden_content; do if echo "$content" | grep -qi "$term"; then echo "🚨 Security: Potential secret detected ($term)" && exit 1; fi; done

echo '[HOOK:BACKUP] Creating timestamped backup of existing file'; input=$(cat 2>/dev/null || echo '{}'); file_path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // "unknown"' 2>/dev/null); if [ -f "$file_path" ] && [ "$file_path" != "unknown" ]; then backup_dir="results/archive/$(date +%Y-%m-%d)"; mkdir -p "$backup_dir" 2>/dev/null && cp "$file_path" "$backup_dir/$(basename "$file_path").$(date +%H%M%S).bak" 2>/dev/null && echo "💾 Backup created for $(basename "$file_path")"; fi

echo '[HOOK:QUALITY] Checking document quality (word count, size)'; input=`cat 2>/dev/null || echo '{}'`; content=`echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.content // ""' 2>/dev/null`; words=`echo "$content" | wc -w 2>/dev/null || echo 0`; size=`echo "$content" | wc -c 2>/dev/null || echo 0`; if [ "$words" -lt 100 ]; then echo "⚠️  Quality: Document under 100 words ($words)"; fi; if [ "$size" -gt 100000 ]; then echo "⚠️  Size warning: `expr $size / 1000`KB content"; fi

echo '[HOOK:FILE-STATS] Reporting generated file statistics'; input=$(cat 2>/dev/null || echo '{}'); file_path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // "unknown"' 2>/dev/null); if [ "$file_path" != "unknown" ] && [ -f "$file_path" ]; then size=$(wc -c < "$file_path" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); word_count=$(wc -w < "$file_path" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); echo "📄 $(basename "$file_path") generated ($word_count words, ${size} bytes)"; fi

echo '[HOOK:PROGRESS] Logging file progress to CSV'; input=`cat 2>/dev/null || echo '{}'`; file_path=`echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // "unknown"' 2>/dev/null`; if [ "$file_path" != "unknown" ] && [ -f "$file_path" ]; then timestamp=`date '+%H:%M:%S'`; lines=`wc -l < "$file_path" 2>/dev/null || echo 0`; [ ! -d results/logs ] && mkdir -p results/logs 2>/dev/null; echo "$timestamp|`basename "$file_path"`|$lines" >> results/logs/progress.csv; fi

echo '[HOOK:DASHBOARD] Updating live pipeline status'; echo -n '📊 Live Status: ' > results/dashboard_status.txt; for phase in results/*/; do phase=`basename "$phase"`; if [ "$phase" != "archive" ] && [ "$phase" != "logs" ] && [ "${phase#.}" = "$phase" ]; then count=0; for f in "results/$phase"/*.md; do [ -f "$f" ] && count=`expr $count + 1`; done; echo -n "$phase($count) " >> results/dashboard_status.txt; fi; done; echo "- `date +%H:%M:%S`" >> results/dashboard_status.txt

echo '[HOOK:NOTIFY] Sending desktop notification'; input=$(cat 2>/dev/null || echo '{}'); file_path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // "unknown"' 2>/dev/null); if command -v notify-send >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ "$file_path" != "unknown" ] && [ -f "$file_path" ]; then notify-send 'AI Research Pipeline' "📄 $(basename "$file_path") completed"; fi

echo '[HOOK:COMPLETION] Checking phase completion thresholds'; for phase in results/*/; do phase=`basename "$phase"`; if [ "$phase" != "archive" ] && [ "$phase" != "logs" ] && [ "$phase" != "validation" ] && [ "${phase#.}" = "$phase" ]; then count=0; for f in "results/$phase"/*.md; do [ -f "$f" ] && count=`expr $count + 1`; done; case "$phase" in research) threshold=6;; pmf) threshold=3;; gtm) threshold=5;; contradictions) threshold=5;; synthesis) threshold=5;; slides) threshold=1;; landscape) threshold=5;; *) threshold=1;; esac; if [ "$count" -ge "$threshold" ] && [ ! -f "results/.$phase_complete" ]; then echo "🎉 $phase phase completed!" && touch "results/.$phase_complete"; fi; fi; done

input=`cat 2>/dev/null || echo '{}'`; if [ "`echo "$input" | jq -r '.hook_event_name'`" = "PostToolUse" ]; then agent_type=`echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.subagent_type // "unknown"' 2>/dev/null`; duration=`echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_response.totalDurationMs // 0' 2>/dev/null`; tokens=`echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_response.totalTokens // 0' 2>/dev/null`; if [ "$agent_type" != "unknown" ]; then [ ! -d results/logs ] && mkdir -p results/logs 2>/dev/null; echo "`date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'`|$agent_type|completed|${duration}ms|${tokens}tokens" >> results/logs/subagent.log; fi; fi

echo '[HOOK:COST] Calculating and reporting execution cost'; input=$(cat 2>/dev/null || echo '{}'); if [ "$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.hook_event_name')" = "PostToolUse" ]; then duration=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_response.totalDurationMs // 0'); tokens=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_response.totalTokens // 0'); cost=$(awk "BEGIN {printf \"%.6f\", $tokens * 0.000003}" 2>/dev/null || echo "0"); echo "💰 Cost: $${cost} | ⏱️ ${duration}ms | 🪙 ${tokens} tokens"; fi

echo '[HOOK:ERROR] Detecting and logging task execution errors'; input=$(cat 2>/dev/null || echo '{}'); if [ "$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.hook_event_name')" = "PostToolUse" ]; then if echo "$input" | jq -e '.tool_response.error' >/dev/null 2>&1; then agent=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.subagent_type // "unknown"'); echo "🚨 Task execution error detected in $agent" && mkdir -p results/logs && echo "$(date): Error in $agent" >> results/logs/errors.log; fi; fi

echo '[HOOK:SUBAGENT-SUMMARY] Reporting sub-agent completion statistics'; TOTAL_FILES=$(find results -name '*.md' 2>/dev/null | wc -l || echo 0); echo "✅ Sub-agent completed. Total reports: $TOTAL_FILES"

echo '[HOOK:FINAL-STATS] Calculating final pipeline statistics'; FINAL_COUNT=$(find results -name '*.md' 2>/dev/null | wc -l || echo 0); TOTAL_WORDS=$(find results -name '*.md' -exec wc -w {} \; 2>/dev/null | awk '{sum+=$1} END {print sum+0}' || echo 0); echo "🎯 Pipeline complete! Generated $FINAL_COUNT documents ($TOTAL_WORDS words)"
echo '[HOOK:SIZE-REPORT] Reporting total output directory size'; TOTAL_SIZE=$(du -sh results/ 2>/dev/null | cut -f1 || echo '0B'); echo "📁 Total output: $TOTAL_SIZE in results/"

echo '[HOOK:SUCCESS-CHECK] Validating pipeline completion status'; if [ -f results/.research_complete ] && [ -f results/.gtm_complete ]; then echo "✅ Full pipeline success: Research + GTM phases completed"; else echo "⚠️  Partial completion - check missing phases"; fi

echo '[HOOK:PACKAGE] Creating deliverables package if pipeline complete'; COMPLETED_PHASES=$(ls results/.*.complete 2>/dev/null | wc -l || echo 0); TOTAL_FILES=$(find results -name '*.md' -not -path '*/archive/*' 2>/dev/null | wc -l || echo 0); if [ "$COMPLETED_PHASES" -ge 3 ] && [ "$TOTAL_FILES" -gt 15 ]; then echo "📦 Generating delivery package..."; tar -czf "results/deliverables-$(date +%Y%m%d).tar.gz" results/*/  --exclude='results/archive' --exclude='results/logs' 2>/dev/null && echo "📦 Deliverables packaged successfully"; fi

echo '[HOOK:DETECT] Analyzing user prompt for pipeline execution keywords'; input=$(cat 2>/dev/null || echo '{}'); user_prompt=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.prompt // "no-prompt"' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$user_prompt" | grep -qi 'execute.*pipeline\|run.*pipeline\|start.*pipeline\|Read and execute.*AGENTS\.md\|execute.*workflow.*AGENTS\.md\|execute.*AGENTS\.md'; then echo "🎯 Detected pipeline execution request - monitoring enabled"; fi

echo '[HOOK:SETUP] Archiving previous results and creating directory structure'; input=$(cat 2>/dev/null || echo '{}'); user_prompt=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.prompt // "no-prompt"' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$user_prompt" | grep -qi 'execute.*pipeline\|run.*pipeline\|start.*pipeline\|Read and execute.*AGENTS\.md\|execute.*workflow.*AGENTS\.md\|execute.*AGENTS\.md'; then echo 'Archiving current pipeline results...'; make archive_current && make create_struct && echo '📁 Directory structure created'; fi

echo '[HOOK:STATS] Counting previous pipeline sessions'; input=$(cat 2>/dev/null || echo '{}'); user_prompt=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.prompt // "no-prompt"' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$user_prompt" | grep -qi 'execute.*pipeline\|run.*pipeline\|start.*pipeline\|Read and execute.*AGENTS\.md\|execute.*workflow.*AGENTS\.md\|execute.*AGENTS\.md'; then PREV_SESSIONS=`find results/archive -maxdepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | wc -l`; echo "📊 Previous sessions: `expr $PREV_SESSIONS - 1`"; fi

echo '[HOOK:MODE] Detecting and logging pipeline execution mode'; input=`cat 2>/dev/null || echo '{}'`; user_prompt=`echo "$input" | jq -r '.prompt // "no-prompt"' 2>/dev/null`; if echo "$user_prompt" | grep -qi 'execute.*pipeline\|run.*pipeline\|start.*pipeline\|Read and execute.*AGENTS\.md\|execute.*workflow.*AGENTS\.md\|execute.*AGENTS\.md'; then MODE="detailed"; if echo "$user_prompt" | grep -qi 'concise.*mode\|execute.*concise\|in concise mode'; then MODE="concise"; elif echo "$user_prompt" | grep -qi 'detailed.*mode\|execute.*detailed\|in detailed mode'; then MODE="detailed"; fi; echo "📋 Pipeline mode detected: $MODE" && [ ! -d results/logs ] && mkdir -p results/logs 2>/dev/null && echo "`date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'` - Pipeline executed in $MODE mode" >> results/logs/mode_log.txt; fi
